response.justification: While the candidate is a highly skilled full-stack developer with extensive experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, their background does not align with the core requirements of this role. The position specifically demands deep expertise in C++, industrial automation protocols, and IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards. With only 7 months of professional C++ experience from nearly a decade ago and no background in industrial machinery or secure IoT development, the candidate is not a suitable fit for this Senior Manager C++ position.
strengths: Extensive software engineering background with over 15 years of experience across various domains.
Possesses advantageous skills listed in the job description, including Node.js, React, REST APIs, and cloud services.
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks recent and extensive experience with C++, STL, and related multi-threaded desktop/embedded development.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus) or IoT environments.
Missing required industrial cybersecurity expertise, specifically IEC 62443 and SDL practices.
